title: Administration
description: The Administration section provides centralized control over platform configuration, user access, security settings, and system health. Administrators can manage user accounts, define roles and permissions, configure authentication providers, monitor system status, and maintain vocabulary and AI provider settings.
tips: Use Roles & Permissions to implement least-privilege access, granting users only the capabilities required for their research role.
Review the Audit Log regularly to track user activity and ensure compliance with your organization's data governance policies.
Configure Authentication Providers to integrate with your institution's SSO or identity management infrastructure.
Monitor System Health to proactively identify performance bottlenecks before they affect research workflows.
Use Vocabulary Admin to synchronize and validate OMOP vocabulary versions across your environment.
